title: RIID-4651: Agentbridge Root Provider Runtime Domain

blocks.text: This slice moves the provider-neutral C4 Provider Runtime / Adapter root domain.

items: focused public CI for reducer, telemetry, blocked-arg, and semantic-activity gates

blocks.text: The package is stdlib-only and intentionally does not import concrete provider packages, task/project persistence, process execution implementations, local API packages, or filesystem/network adapters.

This slice does not move `internal/agentbridge/session`, runtimeactor, supervisor, bridge, controlplane, detectutil, concrete provider adapters, `ToolRef.Args` flattening/toolpolicy execution, task DB/project/mwsd local API packages, packaging artifacts, private infra, secrets, or local machine state.
